# mtt attribution + verb sugar
exec mtt init
# single root type with green gates (task is a root default type)
cp gated.yaml .mtt/config.yaml
exec mtt add 'A'
stdout 'created t1'

# verb sugar: `mtt <status> <id>` moves one edge and records who/why
exec mtt in_progress t1 --who alice --why 'start work'
stdout 't1: tbd → in_progress'

# show renders the subject and the durable reason
exec mtt show t1
stdout 'by alice'
stdout 'start work'

# unknown first arg is not sugar -> unknown command
! exec mtt bogus t1
stderr 'unknown command'

# --- required attribution: switch to a config that requires who+why ---
cp required.yaml .mtt/config.yaml

# missing both -> blocked before the gate, one error naming both fields
! exec mtt status t1 done
stderr 'missing required attribution'
stderr 'who'
stderr 'why'

# --no-run does NOT bypass attribution
! exec mtt status t1 done --no-run
stderr 'missing required attribution'

# providing who + why succeeds through the green gate (via the sugar)
exec mtt done t1 --who alice --why 'ship it'
stdout 't1: in_progress → done'

-- gated.yaml --
version: 1
project:
  name: demo
types:
  - name: task
    prefix: t
    default: true
    parents: []
    statuses:
      - {name: tbd, kind: initial}
      - {name: in_progress, kind: active}
      - {name: done, kind: terminal}
    transitions:
      - {from: tbd, to: in_progress, commands: ["true"]}
      - {from: in_progress, to: done, commands: ["true"]}
-- required.yaml --
version: 1
project:
  name: demo
require:
  who: true
  why: true
types:
  - name: task
    prefix: t
    default: true
    parents: []
    statuses:
      - {name: tbd, kind: initial}
      - {name: in_progress, kind: active}
      - {name: done, kind: terminal}
    transitions:
      - {from: tbd, to: in_progress, commands: ["true"]}
      - {from: in_progress, to: done, commands: ["true"]}
